title: Fearless Boundary Reset
problem: The package split is mostly correct, but shallow compatibility modules, heavy OpenAI routing, duplicated provider/runtime stream vocabulary, and repeated provider transport choreography still blur the deepest seams.

evidence.summary: OpenAI route adapter proof passed targeted tests, package tests, analyze, dependency guards, root guard, and git diff --check.

OpenAI-family route selection, option resolution, capability policy, Chat Completions request policy, and OpenAI tool-option acceptance are now owned by OpenAIFamilyProfile; targeted tests, OpenAI package tests, analyze, guards, and git diff --check passed.
Provider transport kit passed provider-utils tests, OpenAI/Google/Anthropic targeted regressions, broader provider package tests, analyze, dependency guards, root guard, and git diff --check.
Provider transport guardrails passed focused guard tests, workspace dependency guard, root boundary guard, analyze, and git diff --check.

Breaking compatibility exit deleted llm_dart_core from the package graph and passed focused migration tests, release/test orchestration tests, analyze, root/workspace/transport guards, and git diff --check.

Provider specification seam freeze added ProviderSpecification, required Provider.specification, updated registry/facet support, and passed provider/provider-facade tests, analyze, guards, and git diff --check.

Stream vocabulary composition deleted duplicate AI content/tool stream codecs, delegated model-call event JSON to the provider codec through the bridge, and passed AI/provider stream tests, package tests, analyze, guards, and git diff --check.

Runtime helper option consolidation added TextGenerationRuntimeRequest, moved generate/stream/output/text-call option plumbing through the internal runtime request seam, and passed targeted runtime tests, full AI package tests, analyze, guards, and git diff --check.

Migration docs and examples now document the breaking architecture line, direct provider package imports, llm_dart_core deletion, provider specifications, and focused runtime facades; analyze, guards, and git diff --check passed.
Final closeout passed analyzer, OpenAI package tests, workspace/root/transport guards, and git diff --check; TODO, MILESTONES, HANDOFF, DESIGN, and WORKSTREAM.json now mark the lane closed.

continue_policy.notes: The lane is closed. Suggested follow-ons are non-blocking: public object-style runtime request API, removal of thin historical OpenAI-family wrapper helpers after downstream audit, and release hardening.
